interpretation.method: Aggregate MoM changes in volume, MAU, and fees around each category fee activation. Per-market cohort analysis is structurally impossible because Polymarket sets fees at market registration, not retroactively — no market experienced both states.
interpretation.signal: Zero month-over-month decline in volume or MAU around any of the three activations.
interpretation.implication: The fee-attrition concern is empirically unsupported at the aggregate level. Any attrition on specific cohorts is masked (or offset) by continued aggregate growth.
